task_completion.description: Format the document into a 2-column layout
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the Calligra Words document should be visually split into two vertical columns on the page.

task_completion.description: Apply structured formatting to section headings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Headings such as 'Background', 'Epidemiologic Investigation', and 'Discussion' should be visually distinct from the body text (e.g., bolded, larger font size, or styled as headers).
The pathogen name 'Listeria monocytogenes' should appear in italics wherever it is mentioned in the text.

task_completion.description: Convert comma-separated data into a formatted table
task_completion.visual_evidence: There should be a visible table grid containing the epidemiological data (e.g., Deli Turkey, Roast Beef, Attack Rate) with the caption 'Table 1: Food-Specific Attack Rates for Implicated Items'.

task_completion.description: Adjust the alignment of the body text
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body paragraphs (e.g., 'On October 12, 2025...') should have adjusted alignment, such as justified text (straight edges on both the left and right margins).

task_completion.description: Save the completed report to its original location
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Calligra Words window title should show 'outbreak_report.odt' without an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk), or a save action/dialog should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent used Calligra Words to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Formatting actions should be performed within the Calligra Words GUI, not in another word processor or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing python scripts, sed, awk, or pandoc commands modifying the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: The table is a genuine table object, not simulated with spaces
integrity.visual_evidence: The table should have visible cell boundaries or be manipulated using Calligra Words' table tools, rather than just text aligned with spaces or tabs.
